todos.text: Restore /api/agent/plan to support both mock and OpenAI/pi-ai modes via GRUNTEND_AGENT_MODE without requiring a key in mock mode.
Add PUBLIC_GRUNTEND_AGENT_DEBUG debug mode for /agent with visible runtime/hypermedia errors and compact debug details.
Add regression coverage for example mock plans by executing each returned plan through the Gruntend runtime, especially avoiding unsupported for...of in JailJS.
Extend semantic hypermedia actions to support nested path-style controls such as /menus/create and /menus/{id}/items/{id}/actions before adding richer rendered item lists.
Add regression coverage for example mock plans by executing each returned plan through the Gruntend runtime, especially avoiding unsupported for...of in JailJS.
